Track Of A Soldier: Jessica has a less than peaceful time during her holiday at a friend's mountain lodge. Is Jessica's latest murder investigation linked to blackmail and a $2m diamond?
Evidence Of Malice: Cabot Cove's Deputy Sheriff, Andy Bloom, becomes a prime suspect for murder after incriminating evidence is found in his car. Can Jessica prove his innocence?
Southern Double-Cross: Does Jessica get more than she bargained for during a trip to Australia? Will a dispute over 130,000 acres of land prove to be a motive for murder?
Race To Death: Jessica investigates the intense rivalry between two yacht captains when one of them is murdered on the eve of a prestigious competition.
What You Don't Know Can Kill You: Joy soon turns to sorrow when Seth's niece comes to Cabot Cove ahead of her wedding.
Mrs. Parker's Revenge: A room mix-up soon reveals a complicated case involving a lethal chemical virus, nation security agents and a ruthless arms dealer.
Death By Demographics: The last ever episode of the hugely popular crime series. Jessica investigates when the manager of a radio station is killed.
Trials And Tribulations: Jessica must prove her innocence after she is accused of perjury during a murder investigation.
Deadly Misunderstanding: A bicycle accident forces Jessica to hire a typist to finish her latest manuscript. Can Jessica prove her new typist's innocence after she is accused of murder?
See You In Court Baby: Can insurance investigator Dennis Stranton prove who really murdered an infamous divorce lawyer?
